heading: Separation at age 62: reserve officers in grades below brigadier general or rear admiral (lower half)
label: 14509 Separation at age 62: reserve officers in grades below brigadier general or rear admiral (lower half)
text: Each reserve officer of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or Marine Corps in a grade below brigadier general or rear admiral (lower half) who has not been recommended for promotion to the grade of brigadier general or rear admiral (lower half) and is not a member of the Retired Reserve shall, on the last day of the month in which that officer becomes 62 years of age, be separated in accordance with .section 14515 of this title
notes: Amendments2006— substituted “62” for “60” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 109–364
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1996section 1691(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
